_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: Sethi Max Royal
project.address: Plot No. GH-02B, Sector 76, Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201301
project.description: Sethi Max Royal is a ready-to-move-in family residential society in Sector 76, Noida, located just 500 meters from the Sector 76 Metro Station.
project.long_description: Sethi Max Royal is an established ready-to-move-in residential development in Sector 76, Noida. Built across 5 acres with 80% open landscaped area, the project features 9 premium towers with G+21 floors, housing a total of 726 units. Constructed with high structural safety standards, the society offers elegant 2 and 3 BHK family configurations with modular kitchens and wooden flooring. Residents enjoy an active and secure lifestyle with high-quality amenities, including a premium clubhouse, swimming pool, jacuzzis, and several indoor/outdoor sports courts. Strategically positioned next to Vishwakarma Road and within a 5-minute walk of the metro station, Sethi Max Royal offers exceptional urban accessibility coupled with mature neighborhood conveniences.
marketing_claims: Pre-installed Power Backup and Gated Security
project.project_risk_flag: None: Fully delivered ready-to-move-in society with active registries and zero delivery delays.

builder.name: Sethi Group
builder.company_overview: Sethi Group is a reputable and trusted real estate developer operating in the Delhi NCR region, headquartered in Noida. Established with a vision to deliver premium commercial and residential complexes, the builder has a strong history of timely construction and reliable quality finishes. Known for customer-centric professional practices, transparency, and innovation, Sethi Group has established notable landmarks in key central Noida corridors.

unit_types.name: 2 BHK (Comfort)
unit_types.subtitle: Compact and highly efficient 2 BHK
unit_types.description: Premium 2 BHK layout optimized to prevent dead passages. Features an open dining layout, modular L-shaped kitchen, and a private bedroom balcony with serene view of central gardens.
whats_included: Vitrified floor tiling in drawing and kitchen areas
Modular kitchen layout up to counter level
Premium branded sanitary ware in bathrooms
Concealed copper wiring with modular switches

unit_types.name: 3 BHK (Elite)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious and bright 3 BHK
unit_types.description: A spacious 3-bedroom, 2-bathroom flat featuring semi-furnished interiors, wood woodwork wardrobes, and two large balconies with direct, unblocked park and pool facing views.
whats_included: Laminated wooden flooring in master bedroom
Vitrified tile flooring in living and dining zones
Fully modular kitchen with deep bowl stainless steel sink
Double glazed windows for noise insulation

connectivity.name: Noida Sector 76 Metro Station
connectivity.notes: Aqua Line metro station with seamless link to Blue Line

connectivity.name: Spectrum Metro Mall Sector 75
connectivity.notes: Multiplex, retail anchor, and high street dining hub

assumptions: All pricing reflects current ready-to-move secondary resale rates in Sector 76.
GST is 0% as the project is fully completed with Completion Certificate.
Stamp duty is subject to standard UP government regulatory rates.

payment_plan.notes: Standard registry plan where transactions execute within 45 to 60 days.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: Sethi Max Royal is an exceptionally located, fully completed and legally secure ready-to-move housing society representing highly efficient family sizing at attractive price points.
why_buy: Unmatched Transit Proximity: Only 500 meters (5 minutes walk) to Sector 76 Metro Station.
Clean Legal Pedigree: Active registrations, zero delay moratoria, and stable builder profile with no land disputes.
Cost Efficiency: Competitive sqft rates compared to newer surrounding projects with excellent open-space ratios.
why_avoid: Compact Sizing: Sizing is focused on comfortable mid-income families; lacks large luxurious formatting.
Visitor Parking Gaps: Gated society layout can face parking friction for guest vehicles during weekends.
decision_profile.best_for: Mid-income corporate professionals working in Noida IT corridors seeking immediate, legally safe metro-connected housing.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Luxury-seeking HNIs or speculative flippers looking for large carpet configurations and signature premium branding.
decision_profile.recommendation_notes: Highly verified ready-to-move-in property with active registries.
decision_profile.advisor_notes: Sethi Max Royal represents a solid defensive buy for an end-user who prioritizes daily metro commutes and legal safety over luxury finishes.

buyerPersonas.headline: Prime Transit Value
reasons: 500 meters walking distance to Aqua line metro.

buyerPersonas.headline: Zero Delivery Risks
reasons: Ready society with 500+ happy resident families.
Active bi-partite registries directly through Noida Authority.

riskRadar.description: Project fully delivered in 2015. Zero construction risk.
Stable private developer, active registries, clean title.

transparency_checks.label: RERA Registered
transparency_checks.details: Completed pre-RERA. Fully approved under Noida Authority.

transparency_checks.label: OC / CC Received
transparency_checks.details: Completion Certificate issued by Noida Authority.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent moderate capital appreciation driven by sector maturity and high retail footfalls.
investment_insights.rental_desc: Highly sought-after by young IT professionals due to immediate walking metro link.
investment_insights.market_desc: Consistent resale and rental velocity with extremely low vacancy times.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Active secondary market allows exits within 30-45 days.

neighborhood_advantages.title: Established Core
neighborhood_advantages.description: Dense high-rise residential core with robust neighborhood safety.

persona_descriptions.Metro Commuter Family: Mid-income professional nuclear families with daily office commutes to Noida Sectors 62/63, Sector 135/142, or Central Delhi who rely on secure, walking-distance rapid transit.
persona_descriptions.IT Professional Couples: Working tech couples seeking high-efficiency configurations, low entry price, and immediate possession.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative — avoids all pre-possession developer delays
persona_profile.motivation_note: Driven by affordable RTM entry, walking-distance metro link, and secure gated layout.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: One of the most practical and legally reliable ready-to-move properties in Sector 76. Its principal asset is location, offering immediate metro transit at a competitive mid-market rate.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Excellent for end-users requiring direct metro access. Settle immediately into an established, secure community with schools and markets at your doorstep.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: A stable defensive investment focused on solid, reliable rental yields (3.5%+) and consistent low-risk capital appreciation rather than high speculative gains.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Highly suitable for nuclear families. Active kid communities, well-fenced parks, and nearby premium schools ensure a comfortable child-rearing environment.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Strong rental demand with near-zero vacancy rates due to its unmatched metro proximity. Steady yield asset.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Standard mid-to-high level finishes with Mivan structures, representing good functional specifications though lacking ultra-high design lines.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Among the lowest risk options in Sector 76. Clear of developer litigation, active registries, and robust operational AOA management.
walk_away_conditions: Buyers looking for large palatial units exceeding 2,000 sqft.
Strict requirement for premium, high-density concierge infrastructure.
negotiation_leverage: Use other Sector 76 distressed legacy options (like neighboring Amrapali) to extract discounts from individual private sellers.
Identify urgent resale listings seeking direct secondary cash transfers.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Act immediately. High demand for metro-facing RTM layouts keeps inventory levels tight.
recommendation_profile.admin_notes: Completed and clean society with active registries.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Completely free of developer NCLT proceedings or historical financial defaults; private builder maintenance; faster direct bipartite registries.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Slightly cheaper pricing and a larger 15-acre footprint.
competitors.verdict: Sethi wins on legal clean title and private maintenance; Amrapali wins on budget and larger society landscape.
